stopConditions: Two consecutive tool failures on the same operation
Implementation diverges from compiled blueprint intent

Failure mode reached: GovernorState does not exist for sessionId — governor was not initialized; SemanticGateEnforcer fails to load CompiledInvariantSet — gate remains unarmed and all tool calls would pass unguarded; session fails to transition to active state — session state machine guard fails

Failure mode reached: GovernorState.isAdaptive = false — operator has disabled adaptive polling; rapid velocity spike causes interval to floor at 500ms repeatedly — system enters high-frequency polling storm; currentPollingIntervalMs written value is below 500ms floor — arithmetic underflow

Failure mode reached: compiled CompiledInvariantSet version is not greater than bootstrap version — compilation produced stale result; atomic swap fails mid-operation — gate is momentarily unarmed between bootstrap and compiled set; session fails to transition to active state — session remains in bootstrapping indefinitely
requiredEvidence: SemanticGateEnforcer is armed with current compiledInvariantSetId; GovernorState is active; session transitions from bootstrapping or compiling to active; ObservabilitySnapshot records activation
GovernorState.currentPollingIntervalMs is within [500ms, basePollingIntervalMs]; interval change is proportional to drift velocity; change is logged to ObservabilitySnapshot

SemanticGateEnforcer armed with bootstrapFlag=false CompiledInvariantSet; session is in active state; bootstrap CompiledInvariantSet is superseded but retained in history; AuditLogEntry records transition with timestamp and both invariant set ids
